sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15944" key="a)rxiza/pfhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχι-ζάπφης</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄρχι-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, title of <sense id="n15944.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">religious official</tr_> at <pb n="253" TEIform="pb"/> Delos, Roussel <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Délos Colonie Athénienne</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">416</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
